programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The First Lady of the Silent Screen, Lillian Gish, guest stars as Isaac's former English teacher, whom he tries to avoid.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A judge (Nancy Walker) finds herself attracted to a man (George Gobel) she has placed on probation for being married to three women at once.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Gopher and Doc battle for the affections of Gopher's gorgeous pen pal (Marie Laurin) who has come to live with him.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Morgan son conducidos hasta una comunidad que parece segura y bien abastecida. Todo resulta tan idílico, que la desconfianza ante lo que están presenciando aflora en ellos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tara llega a un poblado en el que sólo viven unas peligrosas mujeres que no la dejarán salir de ahí fácilmente. Mientras tanto, Heath, quien la acompañaba en la búsqueda de provisiones, se pierde tratando de escapar de un ataque zombi.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carl se separa de Jesus y llega, oculto en un camión, a la guarida de los Saviors con la intención de matar a Negan. Mientras tanto, Rosita fuerza a Eugene a que le fabrique una bala y Michonne pone en marcha su propio plan contra Negan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Shekinah is trying to move up in the hair industry and hopes a booth at the world famous Bronner Bros. hair show will help take her there. With Tip and Tameka out of town, will Shekinah be able to keep it classy? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Tip sees Major spending more time with his video games than his friends, Tip decides to set up a play date. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Major asks Tip to be in his new music video for his single "Hello" with CeeLo Green, Tip decides to incorporate the entire family. Will the kids be up to the challenge?

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Messiah turning thirteen and entering into young adulthood, Tip encourages Messiah to go on his very first date. But in typical Harris family fashion, going solo is a no-no, so the whole family comes along for the ride. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Tip finds an incriminating text on Niq Niq's phone, he sets out with Major to get to the bottom of things. Later, Tameka encourages Shekinah to join an improv group and sends the funniest person she knows to join her, King. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka's brother Lil' Red stops by the house and asks King to join his grandfather's group, The Tams for a night. Meanwhile, Tip joins Deyjah in a baking class to perfect the homemade cupcake.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Shekinah moves into her new home, Tameka convinces her she needs home owner's boot camp. Back at the house, Tip is discouraged by his kids' lack of basketball skills and sets up a game with NBA star Josh Smith. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Fed up with Shekinah always saying she wants to be white, Tameka suggests they spend the day doing things white people do. Meanwhile, Tip discovers inappropriate pictures on his kids' social media accounts. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After attending their first NASCAR event, Tip and Tameka argue over who's the better driver. With each of their personal cars on the line, the whole family joins in on the competition. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: King, Major, and Precious are hired for their first paid gig at the circus. Under pressure, will the kids step up to the challenge? Meanwhile, Messiah and Domani try to use Tip's know how to start their own fashion line. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka and Shekinah decide to make a unique workout video for people who don't like to work out. Meanwhile, Tip takes the boys to LA for some business and pleasure. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Domani and King come home with less than stellar report cards, Tip takes matters into his own hands and hires them a tutor. Meanwhile, Tameka prepares her new girl group French Kiss for their first paid gig. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: As Tip heads out for the first leg of his two-month long nationwide tour with Lil' Wayne, the kids aren't ready for him to go and convince him to let them come.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: In the third season finale, Tip decides to take the family to Puerto Rico for a much needed getaway. Meanwhile, Tameka meets up with Niq Niq and the OMG Girlz as they embark on their newest tour.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: In an attempt to find out more about his daughter's lives, Tip participates in something he wouldn't normally do. But as the girls start to dish the details, is Tip ready to hear what they have to say? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After Messiah and Domani rescue Precious from an asthma attack, Tip makes sure the kids have proper training for any emergency situation. Meanwhile, Tameka and Shekinah head off to a retreat and put their friendship to the test. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: In an effort to teach their family about teamwork, Tip and Tameka take the kids to Space Camp. But when the kids have a difficult time working together, their mission becomes jeopardized. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Tameka finally convinces Tip to get the kids something they've wanted for years, the kids are ecstatic. But before it becomes official the kids are put to the test to see if they are responsible enough for something this big. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Russell Simmons stops by the Harris home he and Domani hit it off. With Niq Niq getting ready to leave the nest Tameka is having a hard time letting go and arranges a day for their friends to spend together to give them life advice. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: To set an example for her children, Tameka is motivated to hit the books and get her GED. Meanwhile, with his teenage sons racking up the phone bill, Tip takes them to a place where they can earn money - the hard way. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Shekinahshe seeks help from Tameka to try and find an assistant who can handle her growing work load and personal life. With Domani spending more time in the recording studio, Tip wants him to experience the full studio life. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When King and Major rattle off a list of what they want to be when they grow up, Tameka decides to expose the boys to alternative options to expand their horizons. Tip makes a Make-A-Wish recipient's dream come true. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Tip chaperones Major's field trip to the fire station he takes it to another level with a surprise the kids will never forget. Meanwhile, Tameka's on a mission to get her mom out of the house after her dad's recent passing. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Majors first dance but he has to overcome his fears and ask a girl out on a date, learn to dance, get a suit and corsage. Will Major nerves get the best of him when the big moment comes?

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: The Harris family is embarking on a new business venture together - lemonade! The kids decide they want to start a lemonade business and Tip and Tameka are there to help them every step of the way.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Shekinah has a new hair product for sale and she wants to promote it by enlisting Tameka's help in producing an infomercial. Meanwhile, Tip takes his sons to a very special event.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Shekinah's chain smoking is driving Tameka crazy so she decides to take her to a hypnotist. Tip takes the kids to his old neighborhood where he shocks them with a very interesting hometown game.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: The Christies forge ahead with their gay-themed wedding, Gloria and Laura have a wrenching heart-to-heart about growing distant, and Draya finally reaches her boiling point with Jackie. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard’s feud reaches a boiling point after Jungle Grrrl makes it personal. The Fabulous, Lana Star sets the record straight against allegations and brings a surprising new client to WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard’s feud reaches a boiling point after Jungle Grrrl makes it personal. The Fabulous, Lana Star sets the record straight against allegations and brings a surprising new client to WOW.

programme.desc: Fans go wild as new WOW Superhero from the beaches of California, Cali Ray makes her debut. The self-proclaimed 'Grits N Glam' duo Jessie Jones and Amber O’Neal secure a rematch against the team they believe cost them the gold.

programme.title: My Road To WOW
programme.desc: WOW Superheroes reveal their surprising backstories. Miami Sweet Heat's physical therapy patients are the real superheroes, Princess Aussie's journey to the U.S. almost didn't happen, and Jennifer Florez represents a new generation of wrestlers.

programme.title: My Road To WOW
programme.desc: WOW Superheroes reveal what drove them into the ring. Sahara Spars opens up about a traumatic life-changing experience, Jessie Jones reveals her long journey to the top, and Leia Makoa makes her parents and her island proud.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Miami Sweet Heat's Lindsey and Laurie Carlson and Animal Instinct's Goldie Collins and Katarina Jinx both called "next" on the WOW Tag Team Championships last week, the main event sees a triple confrontation with both teams.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The qualifying matches are over, and twelve competitors are finally ready to compete in the over-the-top-rope Battle Royal for the WOW World Championship vacated by The Beast. Who will be the last woman standing and NEW WOW World Champion?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's the beginning of a new reign in WOW as new WOW World Champion The Classmaster, accompanied by the IQ Superior Samantha Smart, celebrates The Classmaster victory in last week's Championship Battle Royal.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: All eyes - and one team's mouths - are on the main event - as a Dog Food Match between Animal Instinct and Big Rig Betty and Jessie Jones takes place. The loser will be forced to eat dog food!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Las Vegas VIP Abilene Maverick wants one thing and one thing only - and it's the WOW World Championship for her bestie, reality TV star Paola Mayfield! And, in the Main Event, The Classmaster defends her WOW World Championship for the first time.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Genesis remains in the championship title hunt and her challenge could be the toughest of all when she battles the Albanian Grappler, Xena Phoenix. In the Main Event, Miami's Sweet Heat, Lindsey and Laurie Carlson continue to seek to up their win record.

programme.title: My Road To WOW
programme.desc: WOW Superheroes reveal their path to the ring. Keta Rush goes from bullied to bully buster, Tiki Chamorro represents the true pride of her island of Guam, and Kandi Krush rises from crushed Olympic dreams to crushing her opponents.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is approached by the wife of a wanted man eager to turn himself in peacefully, provided Josh splits the bounty with his wife.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition into the desert to locate the cache of Spanish gold.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a young runaway is framed for killing a Pinkerton agent, Randall turns detective to uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh comes to the aid of his old friend Jesse, who is being strong-armed into selling the Outrider Hotel and Saloon owned by his beautiful girlfriend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A decidedly different and dangerous assignment awaits Josh when he agrees to go into the Apache camp and compete in their contests to win the hand of a woman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Pursuing killer Joe Collins into the Superstition Mountains, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A blindly obedient religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh receives a letter from a girl at the St.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly accepts an offbeat assignment: finding a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest and loneliest man in the West.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The government employs Randall to portray an escaped prisoner in order to trick his cellmate into leading authorities to the $50,000 he stole and stashed away in a secret location.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall finds his prey in the hands of a lynch mob wiping out his bounty.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Who needs enemies with friends like the residents of Rogue City, who celebrate Randall for bringing in notorious killer Jumbo Kane.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked out of his bounty by crafty criminal Hunt Willis and his accomplice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Against better judgment after losing a quick draw contest and bet, Josh serves as a guide for a dandified East Coast gun salesman who comes west to retrieve and replace a defective gun he sold to notorious outlaw Curly Bill Brocius.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On the trail of a Cavalry deserter and the horses he stole, Josh rides into a town ruled as the private fiefdom of its autocratic, psychopathic marshal who is holding the horses and deserter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Hired by a father to bring back the man who killed his son Josh is surprised when he doesn't get paid because he brought the man back alive.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh must bring a man back for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings a wanted man into the Mesa City Sheriff, only to find he killed the sheriff's brother.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is looking for a man who, while trying to rob a bank, is bitten by a rabid dog.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man shoots his brother over ownership of their property and blames it on an Indian who reclaimed his horse the man found and stole.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is captured by a corrupt deputy and is forced by the sheriff to work on a chain gang in a gold mine.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed. The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion's strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion's Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey's monsters and his Life Points. Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a feeding frenzy as Odion's Mystical Beast Selket devours Joey's monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Selket when it ingests Joey's monsters whenever they're summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster, The Winged Dragon of Ra, targeted to annihilate the rest of Joey's Life Points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it's a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing Life Points equals losing your memories.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Mai loses more memories under Marik's relentless assault, she loses confidence in her dueling abilities. Will Yugi and friends' never-ending support bring her back to victory, or will her shattered mind be trapped in the Shadow Realm for eternity?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai gains control of Marik's The Winged Dragon of Ra, but she's unable to decipher how to unleash its massively powerful abilities. Can Mai solve the mystery of the Egyptian God Card before Marik solves it himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City finals, Kaiba's mystery opponent is Ishizu. With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel: she will defeat Kaiba with sacrifice's blast! How can Kaiba win when it's predestined that he will lose? Kaiba must change the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik's evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and Millennium Ring, with the loser being trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever. To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's blimp is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen - five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba's past who are out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley's Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's running out of life points, but can his cute little Deck Master Kuriboh unleash his furry fury to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Prepare for a feathered fight when Téa squares off against Big 2 Crump's Nightmare Penguin where the loser will be trapped forever in a block of ice!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa's body turns more and more into a giant popsicle, can she keep her brain from freezing to find a way to melt Big 2's strategy? Or will Big 2's penguin horde waddle all over her?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the judicial jerk Big 3 Johnson who takes the Deck Master form of Judge Man! How can Joey defeat a foe who can destroy Joey's monsters at will?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Just when Joey seems to gain the upper hand, he hits the longest streak of bad luck in the history of mankind! Has Joey's fortunes finally run out, or is a crooked judge ignoring the rules of the law?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 4 Nezbitt challenges Duke, Tristan, and Serenity for the right to gain control of three bodies at once! Will Serenity's errors cost her team the ultimate price when Tristan and Duke can't cover for her mistakes?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: One down, two to go! With the loss of Tristan, Serenity is heartbroken. Can she pull herself together and remember the lessons Tristan taught her to turn the duel around?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
